Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrrogaories
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and request for statement of damages is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $356.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
